description_long: This shotgun features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular frame. The receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail on top, suitable for mounting optics or accessories. The magazine is detachable and curved, indicating a high-capacity, magazine-fed system. The grip is ergonomic and paired with a compact, solid stock, providing stability and control. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip, and the overall build suggests a semi-automatic or tactical pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is large and rounded, allowing for gloved use and quick access.
description: A modern, matte black tactical shotgun with a full-length rail, ergonomic grip, and detachable curved magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed fore-end, muzzle, and the alignment of the Picatinny rail.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full-length rail, curved magazine, ergonomic grip, and compact stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same tactical features, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed fore-end and full-length top rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and ample space for gloved fingers
